overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking through a snowy rural landscape at night. The character encounters a cow in a grassy field before continuing along a lantern-lit snow-covered path toward distant lights.

events.description: cow becomes visible standing in the tall grass ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward a cow standing in the field

notable_agents.action: cow standing still in the grass, facing the character

entered.detail: tall wild grass covering the ground, swaying slightly
wooden split-rail fence running along the left side of the field
warm yellow lights from distant buildings or farmhouses
brown cow with horns standing in the tall grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open grassland at night, with tall grass swaying in the breeze. A wooden fence lines the left side while distant lights twinkle on the horizon. Around 8 seconds, a cow becomes visible standing ahead in the grass, which the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional field between grass and snow

events.description: character passes the cow on the right side and continues forward
ground surface transitions from grass to patchy snow

agents.ego_description: passing the cow and continuing through the field as the terrain becomes snowier

notable_agents.action: cow remains stationary as the character walks past on the left

entered.detail: wooden post with warm glowing lantern illuminating the path
patches of white snow appearing on the ground among the grass

segments.scene_description: The character passes the stationary cow on the right and continues walking as the environment transitions from tall grass to mixed terrain with snow patches. Lantern posts become visible along the left side, providing warm artificial light against the blue night.

events.description: passing close to a lantern post, warm light becomes more prominent on the snow
stone bench becomes visible on the right side of the snow path

agents.ego_description: walking along a snow-covered path toward distant lights, passing lantern posts

entered.detail: path completely covered in snow with visible footprints
stone bench or low wall beside the path on the right
large dark structure or building silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered path illuminated by regularly spaced lantern posts. The ground is now completely white with snow, and a stone bench appears on the right. In the distance, a large dark structure looms against the starry night sky as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark rural landscape that transforms from an open grassy field into a snow-covered path. It begins with the character walking through swaying tall grass beside a wooden fence, moving toward a cow standing in the distance under a starry night sky. As the character passes the animal, the terrain gradually shifts from grass to mixed ground with scattered patches of snow, while warm lantern posts begin to emerge along the left side. The scene then opens into a fully snow-covered walkway illuminated by a row of lanterns, passing a stone bench on the right. Finally, the camera continues forward as a large, dark structure looms on the horizon against the deep blue of the night.
